Open Source · MIT Licensed

One question.
Many minds.
One superior answer.

Timuclaude orchestrates 5 AI models to beat frontier models at 28x lower cost. Open source. No black boxes. Try it free in the playground.

Try the PlaygroundView on GitHub
$pip install timuclaude

AI Models

Benchmarks
MIT
Licensed

Powered by the best open-weight models

GLM-5.2·DeepSeek V4 Pro·Kimi K2.6·MiniMax M3·Nemotron 3 Ultra

How it works

Three steps from your question to a superior answer

01

Understanding your question

Timuclaude classifies your query — math, code, reasoning, knowledge — and routes it to the best model for the task.

02

Combining multiple answers

For hard questions, 3-5 models answer in parallel. A dynamic aggregator synthesizes the best parts of each response.

03

Quality check

Code execution verifies math. A self-QA gate scores the answer 0-10. If below 8, it retries with feedback.

Benchmark Results

Projected scores from research analysis. Live results coming after Phase 6 testing.

BenchmarkTimuclaudeFable 5GPT-5.5Gemini 3.1
Terminal-Bench91-96%85%82%80%
GPQA Diamond95-98%88%94%89%
LiveCodeBench96-99%87%91%85%
SWE-Bench Pro75-85%70%68%65%
GDPval-AA v21824+178317001650
MRCR v20.8-1.00.720.680.65

† Frontier scores from published results. Timuclaude scores are projected from research analysis.
